In addition, two balconies allow abundant natural light and fresh air to flow through the interiors, creating a bright and pleasant ambience.::::Offered in a fully furnished condition, the apartment is ready for immediate occupancy and features a spacious living area along with a separate dining arrangement. Reputed schools are situated within 1 km, while a hospital is conveniently located within the society itself. The metro station is approximately 3 km away, and both the bus station and railway station are easily accessible, ensuring hassle-free commuting.::::Combining furnished interiors, practical amenities and a strategic location near Mansi Circle, this 2 BHK apartment presents an excellent opportunity to own a comfortable and well-connected home in Ahmedabad.

resultList.dtldesc: A spacious and ready-to-move-in opportunity awaits in the well-regarded Soniya Apartment in Paldi, Ahmedabad. This property is ideal for families looking for an established home with a reputable tenure in a central and highly ranked neighbourhood, offering immediate possession and a blank canvas for personal styling.Property SpecificationsThis three-bedroom, two-bathroom apartment offers a super built-up area of 1,503 sq. ft. and is situated on the 7th floor, which is also the top floor of the building. The layout includes two balconies and is being offered as an unfurnished resale unit that is ready for immediate occupancy. The property falls under Freehold ownership and has an age of construction between five and ten years, ensuring a relatively modern structure. The flooring throughout the flat is finished with durable ceramic tiles. The apartment is part of the Soniya Apartment project developed by Sheth Realty, featuring 56 units in total.FacilitiesThe Soniya Apartment complex provides residents with essential communal facilities designed for convenience and a clean living environment. Noteworthy provisions include visitor parking to accommodate guests, dedicated waste disposal management, and access to a refreshing park space. Furthermore, a property of this type would ensure fundamental services such as lift access for upper floors, a consistent water supply, and necessary security arrangements.LocalityThe building is strategically located on the 7th Floor, Soniya Apartment, Chandranagar, Paldi, within the central area of Ahmedabad, Gujarat. Paldi is a highly ranked and sought-after residential neighbourhood, offering excellent proximity to key city landmarks. Residents benefit from easy access to essential social infrastructure, including educational institutes like the National Institute of Design 0.7 kms and Divan-Ballubhai High School 1.8 kms, as well as transportation hubs like the Paldi Metro Station 1.0 kms. The area also hosts various healthcare facilities, such as Shaurya Hospital 0.1 kms, affirming its status as a convenient and well-connected locality.
